productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual Blue Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this canvas shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. The detachable collar allows you to wear it as a hi-ankle or a low one to suit your style. Slip into these shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the fabric upper keeps you fresh and comfortable and the stylish lugs on the outsole enhance your fashion statement. Upper Navy blue denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box and foxing for enhanced protection to the forefoot Detachable hi-ankle collar with print Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Brand badge on lateral ankle for absolute style Midsole Cushioned insole with a fabric footbed for all-day sweat-free comfort Brand badge on the heel for enhanced style Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole in navy blue for flexibility and traction Brand logo shaped lugs in hexagonal cells on the forefoot, with herringbone, wave and slanting grooves on the rest of the outsole
